entity.summary: Brazilian cryptocurrency marketplace launched as Bitpreco in October 2018. It acquired Biscoint in July 2022, joined the Bity group, and moved to the Bitypreco name and domain in September 2023 while continuing to operate.
entity.notes: The former Bitpreco name and current Bitypreco name are one continuing identity.

events.title: Bitpreco launched
events.description: Bitpreco began operating in October 2018 as a Brazilian cryptocurrency marketplace.

events.title: Bitpreco acquired Biscoint
events.description: Bitpreco acquired Biscoint as part of the consolidation that later produced the Bity group.

events.title: Bitpreco became Bitypreco
events.description: The platform aligned its identity with the Bity group and moved to bitypreco.com without ending service continuity.
